## Commands

<a id="command-beep"></a>

### `cmd.beep(times)`

Plays a short beep.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/misc.ts:1186`

```ts
cmd.beep(times: number | undefined = 1): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `times` | `number` \| `undefined` | no | `1` | Number of beeps to play. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.beep()
```

```js
cmd.beep(3)
```

<a id="command-buy_lifesteal"></a>

### `cmd.buy_lifesteal(quantity)`

Buys enough Scroll of Life Steal to reach the requested quantity.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/misc.ts:1018`

```ts
cmd.buy_lifesteal(quantity: number): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `quantity` | `number` | yes |  | Desired inventory quantity. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.buy_lifesteal(20)
```

<a id="command-buy_scroll_of_enrage"></a>

### `cmd.buy_scroll_of_enrage(quantity)`

Buys enough Scroll of Enrage to reach the requested quantity.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/misc.ts:1031`

```ts
cmd.buy_scroll_of_enrage(quantity: number): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `quantity` | `number` | yes |  | Desired inventory quantity. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.buy_scroll_of_enrage(20)
```

<a id="command-do_wheelofdoom"></a>

### `cmd.do_wheelofdoom(toBank)`

Turns in the Wheel of Doom quest when enough Gear of Doom is available.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/misc.ts:1257`

```ts
cmd.do_wheelofdoom(toBank: boolean | undefined = false): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `toBank` | `boolean` \| `undefined` | no | `false` | Whether to bank remaining Gear of Doom afterward. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.do_wheelofdoom(true)
```

<a id="command-drink_consumables"></a>

### `cmd.drink_consumables(items, equipAfter)`

Equips and drinks one or more consumables, then optionally re-equips an item.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/misc.ts:1230`

```ts
cmd.drink_consumables(items: string | readonly string[], equipAfter: string | undefined): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `items` | `string` \| `readonly` `string`[] | yes |  | Consumable item name or names. |
| `equipAfter` | `string` \| `undefined` | yes |  | Optional item to equip after drinking. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.drink_consumables("Felicitous Philtre", "Main Class")
```

```js
cmd.drink_consumables(["Body Tonic", "Potent Honor Potion"])
```

<a id="command-register_command"></a>

### `cmd.register_command(name, handler)`

Registers a script-local custom command.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/misc.ts:1083`

```ts
cmd.register_command(name: string, handler: CustomCommandHandler): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | Command name to expose on `cmd`. |
| `handler` | `CustomCommandHandler` | yes |  | Function invoked when the custom command runs. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.register_command("my_check", async ({ api, skipNext }) => {
  if (!(await api.inventory.contains("Token"))) return skipNext()
})
```

<a id="command-register_condition"></a>

### `cmd.register_condition(name, handler)`

Registers a script-local custom condition expression.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/misc.ts:1114`

```ts
cmd.register_condition(name: string, handler: CustomConditionHandler): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | Condition name to expose on `cmd`. |
| `handler` | `CustomConditionHandler` | yes |  | Function invoked when the condition is evaluated. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.register_condition("has_token", async ({ api }) => {
  return await api.inventory.contains("Token")
})
```

<a id="command-register_handler"></a>

### `cmd.register_handler(type, name, handler)`

Registers a named raw packet handler.

:::tip
The same `(type, name)` pair replaces the previous handler.
:::

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/misc.ts:1047`

```ts
cmd.register_handler(type: PacketHandlerType, name: string, handler: ScriptPacketHandler): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `type` | `PacketHandlerType` | yes |  | Packet stream to observe. |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | Unique handler name within the packet stream. |
| `handler` | `ScriptPacketHandler` | yes |  | Function invoked with each raw packet. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.register_handler("pext", "debug", packet => console.info(packet))
```

<a id="command-register_task"></a>

### `cmd.register_task(name, taskFn)`

Starts a named background task.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/misc.ts:1197`

```ts
cmd.register_task(name: string, taskFn: () => void | Promise<void>): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | Unique task name. |
| `taskFn` | () =&gt; `void` \| `Promise`&lt;`void`&gt; | yes |  | Function to run in the background. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.register_task("heartbeat", () => console.info("tick"))
```

### `cmd.set_delay(ms)`

Sets a delay applied after each subsequent command.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/misc.ts:810`

```ts
cmd.set_delay(ms: number): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ms` | `number` | yes |  | Milliseconds to wait after each command. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.set_delay(750)
```

<a id="command-unregister_handler"></a>

### `cmd.unregister_handler(type, name)`

Removes a previously registered packet handler.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/misc.ts:1066`

```ts
cmd.unregister_handler(type: PacketHandlerType, name: string): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `type` | `PacketHandlerType` | yes |  | Packet stream passed to `register_handler`. |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | Handler name passed to `register_handler`. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.unregister_handler("pext", "debug")
```

<a id="command-wait_for_player_count"></a>

### `cmd.wait_for_player_count(count, exact)`

Waits until the room has enough players, or exactly that many players.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/misc.ts:965`

```ts
cmd.wait_for_player_count(count: number, exact: boolean | undefined = false): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `count` | `number` | yes |  | Player count to wait for. |
| `exact` | `boolean` \| `undefined` | no | `false` | When true, waits for exactly `count`; otherwise waits for at least `count`. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.wait_for_player_count(5)
```

```js
cmd.wait_for_player_count(7, true)
```
